narrative:
Mifflin Township has 27,854 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.9 percentage points.
